name: Beef Chili with Navy Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Lean beef stew trimmed of fat
and cut into 1/4 to 1/2 inch pieces
1 large tomato (1/2 lb), cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any stones from the beans and wash them thoroughly in a sieve.
2. Place the beans in a pot with beef, onions, garlic, chili powder, salt, tomato paste, and tomato.
3. Add 6 cups of water to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
5. Reduce the heat to very low and simmer for 2 to 2 1/2 hours.
